mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.original_price AS originalPrice, p.condition_level AS conditionLevel, p.images AS imagesJson, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.meeting_point_text AS meetingPointText, c.name AS categoryName, ca.name AS campusName, mp.name AS meetingPointName, u.id AS sellerId, u.nick_name AS sellerNickName, u.avatar_url AS sellerAvatarUrl, u.score AS sellerScore, u.auth_status AS sellerAuthStatus FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN campus ca ON p.campus_id = ca.id LEFT JOIN meeting_point mp ON p.meeting_point_id = mp.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{productId} AND p.is_deleted = 0
